name: Apple Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and butter together until smooth.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then add the molasses.
3. Mix in the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg) until just combined.
4. Stir in the applesauce until no lumps remain; the batter will look curdled.
5. Line 2 muffin cups with paper liners and fill each about halfway full.
6. Bake on medium-high for 2-1/2 minutes (for 4 muffins) or 3-1/2 minutes (for 6 muffins).
7. Cool to room temperature before removing from the paper liners. Store up to 4 weeks in an airtight container.
